specific_question: What did the internal audit in 2024 reveal about MediConn Solutions’ compliance with PIPEDA and ISO 27001?
answer: According to an internal audit completed in December 2024, MediConn Solutions maintains 100% compliance with PIPEDA and ISO 27001, a figure which it has maintained for the last three years.
dr_question: How can MediConn Solutions use AI-integrated IT Service Management (ITSM) to improve its support of remote care and mobile health apps while maintaining a high standard of regulatory compliance and delivering a seamless experience for patients and healthcare professionals by Q1 of 2027?
